top_signals.title: Poland busts SIM-swapping gang tied to millions in crypto theft
top_signals.summary: Authorities in Poland have arrested four members of an organized cybercrime group accused of breaching telecommunications partners and hijacking email accounts to carry out SIM-swapping attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: FirstFT: Sanae Takaichi sets out Japan’s $2.3tn investment roadmap
top_signals.summary: Also in today’s newsletter: attack in Strait of Hormuz halts evacuation plan and Jamie Dimon promotes two potential successors
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Supreme Court limits Roundup cancer suits against Bayer's Monsanto
top_signals.summary: Glyphosate, used in Roundup weedkiller, is the most commonly utilized herbicide in agriculture, and it has long been linked to cancer claims.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Close 6/25/2026
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Citi Wealth Head of Portfolio Construction & Analytics Olaolu Aganga, Moderna CEO Stéphane Bancel, 248 Ventures Chief Investment Strategist Lindsey Bell, JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist Stephanie Aliaga, Fundstrat Global Advisors Head of Technical Strategy Mark Newton, Tenstorrent CEO Jim Keller, HB Fuller CEO Celeste Mastin. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Starmer locked in stand-off with Mahmood over her push to sack migration minister
top_signals.summary: Home secretary wants Mike Tapp dismissed after calling for care workers to be exempt from tough immigration controls

top_signals.title: Trump’s tests of the US justice system
top_signals.summary: For the time being, it is just about holding
